title: Direction-aware token enrichment with route quality
summary: Upgrade token enrichment worker to choose quote direction per token (sell for traded/zombie/history, buy otherwise), persist quote_direction and route_quality, and use direction-aware liquidity scoring so enriched economics are no longer artificially flat.
why_safe: Still one Jupiter /quote call per token; no retries, no probing loops, no additional APIs.
Changes are isolated to tooling + focused tests; trading engine and discovery flow are untouched.
Validation batch confirms mixed buy/sell directions and non-flat liquidity score outputs.

expected_results.tests: All worker tests pass and small batch produces mixed quote directions with non-flat liquidity scores.

commit_message: Add direction-aware token enrichment route scoring
notes_for_cursor: Direction selector: sell for traded/zombie/position-history tokens, buy for other tokens. New persisted fields: quote_direction and route_quality. Route quality enum: strong|weak|none. Liquidity score now uses route existence + price impact + direction.
